languages.text: Whenever an ally adjacent to wielder rolls a Dodge test, they get a stacking +4x(wielder’s Iconoclast Rank)% bonus to Dodge until their next turn

traits.locale_text: Whenever an ally adjacent to wielder rolls a Dodge test, they get a stacking +4x(wielder’s Iconoclast Rank)% bonus to Dodge until their next turn

languages.text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Whenever an adjacent ally makes a dodge attempt, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's Iconoclast rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the stat of their next turn.

Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.text: Bitişikteki bir dost birim kaçınma teşebbüsünde bulunduğunda {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değerine üst üste birikebilen +%<u>(4 × takan kişinin {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Ezber Bozan{/g} kademesi)</u> kadar bonus kazanır. Bu etki, bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başlangıcına dek sürer.
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Bitişikteki bir dost birim kaçınma teşebbüsünde bulunduğunda kaçınma değerine üst üste birikebilen +%<u>(4 × takan kişinin Ezber Bozan kademesi)</u> kadar bonus kazanır. Bu etki, bir sonraki turunun başlangıcına dek sürer.

Bitişikteki bir dost birim kaçınma teşebbüsünde bulunduğunda {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değerine üst üste birikebilen +%<u>(4 × takan kişinin {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Ezber Bozan{/g} kademesi)</u> kadar bonus kazanır. Bu etki, bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başlangıcına dek sürer.

languages.text: Cada vez que un aliado adyacente intente {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g}, gana una bonificación acumulativa del +<u>(4 × rango de {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclasta{/g} del portador)</u> % a la esquiva hasta el comienzo de su próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que un aliado adyacente intente esquivar, gana una bonificación acumulativa del +<u>(4 × rango de Iconoclasta del portador)</u> % a la esquiva hasta el comienzo de su próximo turno.

languages.text: 每当邻近盟友试图闪避攻击时，其{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}都会提高<u>（4×装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}自由主义{/g}信念等级）</u>%。此效果可叠加，持续至该名盟友下个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始。
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 每当邻近盟友试图闪避攻击时，其闪避都会提高<u>（4×装备者的自由主义信念等级）</u>%。此效果可叠加，持续至该名盟友下个回合开始。

languages.text: Wenn ein angrenzender Verbündeter versucht, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}auszuweichen{/g}, erhält er bis zum Beginn seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} einen stapelbaren Bonus von +<u>(4 × {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Ikonoklast{/g}-Rang des Trägers)</u> %.
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Wenn ein angrenzender Verbündeter versucht, auszuweichen, erhält er bis zum Beginn seines nächsten Zuges einen stapelbaren Bonus von +<u>(4 × Ikonoklast-Rang des Trägers)</u> %.

languages.text: Chaque fois qu'un allié adjacent tente d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiver{/g}, il gagne un bonus cumulable de +<u>(4 × rang d'{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclaste{/g} du porteur)</u> % à l'esquive jusqu'au début de son prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkHope}Iconoclast{/g} rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Chaque fois qu'un allié adjacent tente d'esquiver, il gagne un bonus cumulable de +<u>(4 × rang d'Iconoclaste du porteur)</u> % à l'esquive jusqu'au début de son prochain tour.

languages.text: 隣接する味方が回避を行おうとすると、次のターンの開始まで+<u>（4×使用者の革新主義ランク）</u>%のスタックボーナスが付与される。
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to dodge, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's Iconoclast rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next turn.

traits.locale_text: 隣接する味方が回避を行おうとすると、次のターンの開始まで+<u>（4×使用者の革新主義ランク）</u>%のスタックボーナスが付与される。
隣接する味方が回避を行おうとすると、次のターンの開始まで+<u>（4×使用者の革新主義ランク）</u>%のスタックボーナスが付与される。

languages.text: Когда союзник на соседней клетке пытается уклониться, он получает суммирующийся бонус +<u>(4 × ранг Схизматика персонажа)</u>% к уклонению до начала своего следующего хода.
languages.original_text: Whenever an adjacent ally attempts to dodge, they gain a stacking +<u>(4 × wearer's Iconoclast rank)</u>% bonus to dodge until the start of their next turn.

traits.locale_text: Когда союзник на соседней клетке пытается уклониться, он получает суммирующийся бонус +<u>(4 × ранг Схизматика персонажа)</u>% к уклонению до начала своего следующего хода.
Когда союзник на соседней клетке пытается уклониться, он получает суммирующийся бонус +<u>(4 × ранг Схизматика персонажа)</u>% к уклонению до начала своего следующего хода.
